/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/Scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/osh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipe.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o pipe
